name: Mega Menu Enhancements
description: Global Page Designer enhancement for the standard catalog navigation. Add one targeted panel per root category.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Mega Menu Enhancements
attribute_definition_groups.description: Global Page Designer enhancement for the standard catalog navigation. Add one targeted panel per root category.

attribute_definitions.name: Enabled
attribute_definitions.description: Disable the Page Designer enhancements while preserving all authored panels.

attribute_definitions.name: Show editorial content on mobile
attribute_definitions.description: Includes panel links and the graphical feature inside expanded mobile categories.

attribute_definitions.name: Default catalog banner behavior
attribute_definitions.description: Fallback shows the existing category banner only when a Page Designer feature is absent. Panels can override this value.
